fullText: 🚀 We're Hiring | Open Source Java Developer (Medior) | Belgium Talent Acquisition Group is looking for an experienced Open Source Java Developer to join an innovative Belgian company specializing in GIS (Geographic Information Systems) and location-based technology solutions.📍 Location: Walloon Brabant, Belgium (Hybrid/Flexible) 📅 Start Date: ASAP 📄 Contract: Time & Material (Renewable) ⏳ Duration: Until April 2027 (220 days)What you'll do:✔ Develop high-quality applications using Java and Spring Boot ✔ Build modern user interfaces with React, Vue.js, or similar frameworks ✔ Design and improve software architecture ✔ Develop REST APIs and microservices ✔ Work with GIS technologies and geolocation solutions ✔ Collaborate with analysts, architects, and developers in an Agile environmentRequired Skills:✅ 3–5+ years of Java development experience ✅ Strong knowledge of Spring Boot ✅ Experience with React, Vue.js, or another modern JavaScript framework ✅ Knowledge of REST APIs, Docker, Linux, SQL/NoSQL databases, JPA/Hibernate ✅ Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) is a plus ✅ Familiarity with GIS technologies is an advantage ✅ French-speaking candidates preferred💼 If you're passionate about open-source technologies and building innovative GIS solutions, we'd love to hear from you!📩 Apply now or send your CV via LinkedIn or email us directly TO admin@bxlinfotech.eu#Hiring #JavaDeveloper #SpringBoot #React #VueJS #OpenSource #GIS #SoftwareDeveloper #BelgiumJobs #TechJobs #ITJobs #TalentAcquisitionGroup

fullText: 🚀 Tech Lead – Java Backend (100% Remote | 10+ Years)Are you a veteran Java developer who has transitioned from writing clean code to architecting distributed, high-throughput systems? Do you thrive on designing resilient microservices frameworks while coaching engineering teams toward technical excellence?SiDRAFORCE Solutions is looking for a Java Backend Tech Lead to spearhead the architecture, development, and scaling of our enterprise application ecosystem. This is a 100% remote, hands-on leadership role designed for a senior engineer who knows how to design for high availability and low latency.📌 The BlueprintRole: Tech Lead – Java Backend ☕🏗️Experience: 10+ Years (Maturity in architectural patterns and team leadership is mandatory)Location: 100% Remote 📍Employment Type: Full-time / Contract 📅🛠️ Your Technical Ecosystem (Mandatory)The Core Platform: Over a decade of deep expertise in Java (Core & Advanced) and Spring Boot.Distributed Architecture: Proven success designing and operating production-grade Microservices and RESTful APIs.Message Streaming: Deep understanding of event-driven architectures utilising Apache Kafka for real-time messaging and data decoupling.Cloud Infrastructure: Strong hands-on experience building, deploying, and managing backend services natively within AWS.Engineering Discipline: Practical authority over modern CI/CD pipelines, automated testing frameworks, and DevOps best practices.🎯 What You Will DoArchitect & Build: Lead the structural design of scalable, secure, and resilient backend systems while remaining hands-on with critical development.Elevate Engineering Quality: Own and define coding standards, lead comprehensive code reviews, and drive performance tuning strategies for reliability and speed.Mentor & Inspire: Act as a technical mentor to mid-level and junior developers, fostering a culture of clean code and continuous learning.Bridge the Strategy: Partner directly with Product Managers, Solution Architects, QA, and DevOps teams to mitigate technical risks and align the engineering sprint roadmap with business goals.👋 Ready to Lead the Next Generation of Backend Systems?If you have the architectural horsepower and the leadership mindset to drive high-performing engineering teams from the comfort of your remote workspace, let's connect.📥 Drop your resume directly into my DMs 📧 Or send your profile over to: ramganesh.m@sidraforce.comKnow a phenomenal Java Tech Lead who excels at distributed cloud engineering? Tag them in the comments below! 👇#Hiring #JavaDeveloper #Springboot #TechLead #Microservices #BackendEngineer #AWSJobs #ApacheKafka #RemoteJobs #SoftwareArchitecture #JavaJobs #CloudEngineering… more
